task_description: find all shell scripts, identify external commands used, generate a command frequency report, and save it to Markdown

messages.content:
```sh
echo "# Command Frequency Report" > command_report.md
echo "" >> command_report.md
cat command_frequency.txt | while read line; do echo "- $line" >> command_report.md; done
```
